name: io.github.ignaciohermosillacornejo/copilot-money-mcp
title: Copilot Money
description: Query Copilot Money personal finance data locally (reads) and manage it via Copilot's GraphQL API (opt-in writes). 34 tools across transactions, accounts, budgets, goals, categories, and recurring charges.

packageArguments.name: --db-path
packageArguments.description: Path to the Copilot Money LevelDB database. Defaults to Copilot Money's standard macOS location.

packageArguments.name: --write
packageArguments.description: Enable write tools (sends authenticated requests to Copilot Money's GraphQL API). Off by default.

packageArguments.name: --live-reads
packageArguments.description: Use GraphQL-backed live reads instead of the local LevelDB cache. Requires an authenticated browser session at app.copilot.money.
